subject: Science Foundations
body:
No Exact Match on IRS Website for New York Science Foundation or Florida  
Science Foundation
No Exact Match at NY Dept of State Website for New York Science  Foundation
No Exact Match at Florida Dept of State Website for Florida Science  
Foundation.
 
However, there are various combinations of some portion of these  names.  For 
example, International Neuroscience Foundation of New York  Ltd.  I was not 
sure as to how distinct and strong you wanted the names to  be or whether you 
were looking to see whether you would be able to squeeze the  names in.  The 
results of my searches are being faxed to you now.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022

body_html:
No Exact Match on IRS Website for New York Science Foundation or Florida Science Foundation
No Exact Match at NY Dept of State Website for New York Science Foundation
No Exact Match at Florida Dept of State Website for Florida Science Foundation.
 
However, there are various combinations of some portion of these names.  For example, International Neuroscience Foundation of New York Ltd.  I was not sure as to how distinct and strong you wanted the names to be or whether you were looking to see whether you would be able to squeeze the names in.  The results of my searches are being faxed to you now.
